title: Luffy Battles Cracker
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Judge, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Luffy, Cracker as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Luffy fights one of Big Mom’s Sweet Commanders while the rescue mission grows more dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've really gone and done it now ...No matter how you slice it, your actions just now qualify as "rebel- Lion" against Mama!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's no coming back from this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: bru(lee will definitely show up again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She can appear just about anywhere there's a mirror!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry... looks like I've dragged you into our mess!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Truth be told, nothing's really changed... My ex-wife had already given her subordinates the directive...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that they couldkill me at their leisure sniffle

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But nevermind that... are you really friends with Lola?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yes!! There's no doubt it's her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which means that her mom is in fact big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fact that everyone Trembles at the sight of this card is proof!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll definitely be putting this to good use, Lola!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Holy crap, Sir Cracker!!! This is way more than we bargained for!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! This is no time to panic. Do not forget you have one job and one job only within these seducing woods!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You can run around all you want...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But do not ever give them an exit from this forest!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This guy's "Busoshoku"... is harder than anything I've come across!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 36 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
